mapper.sql: id, order_no, payment_no, user_id, tool_id, package_id, tool_name_snapshot, package_name_snapshot, package_use_count_snapshot, package_cash_amount_snapshot, package_point_amount_snapshot, package_pay_type_snapshot, order_status, grant_status, grant_time, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, delete_flag
mapper.insert: insert into osh_tool_purchase_record ( order_no, payment_no, user_id, tool_id, package_id, tool_name_snapshot, package_name_snapshot, package_use_count_snapshot, package_cash_amount_snapshot, package_point_amount_snapshot, package_pay_type_snapshot, order_status, grant_status, grant_time, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, delete_flag ) values ( #{orderNo}, #{paymentNo}, #{userId}, #{toolId}, #{packageId}, #{toolNameSnapshot}, #{packageNameSnapshot}, #{packageUseCountSnapshot}, #{packageCashAmountSnapshot}, #{packagePointAmountSnapshot}, #{packagePayTypeSnapshot}, #{orderStatus}, #{grantStatus}, #{grantTime}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, now(), #{updateBy}, now(), #{deleteFlag} )
mapper.select: select from osh_tool_purchase_record where order_no = #{orderNo} and delete_flag = 0 limit 1
select from osh_tool_purchase_record where payment_no = #{paymentNo} and delete_flag = 0 limit 1
mapper.update: update osh_tool_purchase_record set order_status = #{orderStatus}, update_by = #{operator}, update_time = now() where order_no = #{orderNo} and delete_flag = 0
update osh_tool_purchase_record set grant_status = 1, grant_time = #{grantTime}, update_by = #{operator}, update_time = now() where id = #{id} and grant_status = 0 and delete_flag = 0
update osh_tool_purchase_record set grant_status = 2, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{operator}, update_time = now() where id = #{id} and grant_status = 0 and delete_flag = 0
